case_title: RONALD JACKSON CARACTER JR VS. ENCORE MARKETING GROUP INC A NORTH CAROLINA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARACTER JR, RONALD JACKSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENCORE MARKETING GROUP INC A NORTH CAROLINA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARACTER JR, RONALD JACKSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENCORE MARKETING GROUP INC A NORTH CAROLINA CORPORATION $7,640.38 PRINCIPAL, $97.01 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,917.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
